title: Glitch
description: Minecraft, but you can't trust your game. Is your sword actually a dirt block? Are you eating diamonds? Only one way to find out.
body:
Minecraft relies on trust. You trust that a diamond sword is a diamond sword. You trust that a hiss means a creeper. You trust your health bar.

**Glitch takes that trust away.**

![Glitch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8fcd7e057466abdc18a86b54f6b585be73a2f29.png)

This is a client-side challenge mod designed to rewire your brain. Visually, your inventory is a lie. Auditory cues are scrambled into categories that sound *almost* right, but aren't. And there are... other changes. Subtle things. Things that will make you question if it's the mod, or if you're just losing your touch.

It works in Singleplayer and Multiplayer. It is not impossible, but it requires you to abandon your muscle memory and pay attention to every detail.

**Features:**
*   **Visual Scramble:** Items are not what they seem. Read your tooltips.
*   **Audio Hallucinations:** Sounds are shuffled within their own logic. A zombie might sound like a spider, but rain won't sound like a burp.
*   **The Unknown:** There are other features included that are best discovered (or suffered) during gameplay.

**Controls:**
*   **F8:** Scramble the seed and reroll the chaos.
*   `/glitch scramble`: Same as F8.
*   `/glitch seed`: View or set a specific "Reality Seed" to share the nightmare with friends.
